source.subject: RE: Demo scheduling — organizer token appears invalid, propose Zoom handoff
messages:
From: Alice Park <alice@finova.com>
To: Ben Carter <ben@redwood.ai>
Cc: Gopal Singh <gopal.singh@finova.com>
Date: Sun, 08 Nov 2026 14:15:00 -0800
Subject: Redwood demo — proposed time and invite attached

Hi Ben,

Thanks for the quick sync earlier. We're excited to see Redwood in action. Gopal and I are available next week Tuesday 11/16 between 10–11am PT or Wednesday 11/17 1–2pm PT. I've attached a calendar invite for Tuesday 11/16 at 10:30am PT.

Could you confirm the attendee list and whether we should expect a Meet or Zoom link? Our org sometimes blocks external Meet invites and we want to avoid SSO friction.

Regards,
Alice
Alice Park
Product Lead, Finova
[attachment: finova-proposed-invite.ics (text/calendar)]

From: Ben Carter <ben@redwood.ai>
To: Alice Park <alice@finova.com>
Cc: Marissa Cole <marissa@redwood.ai>, Sean Gallagher <sean@redwood.ai>
Date: Sun, 08 Nov 2026 15:02:00 -08:00
Subject: Re: Redwood demo — proposed time and invite attached

Hi Alice — thanks for sending this over. 10:30am PT on 11/16 works for our team. Two quick notes: 

1) I tried to open the ICS and the organizer token on our end looks malformed — the join URL inside the invite is a Google Meet link that resolves to a 404 for external guests (screenshot attached).
2) To avoid SSO/guest problems, would you be open to a Zoom bridge? We can host the Zoom and send a short, password-protected link that usually avoids Meet SSO blocks.

Attaching a screenshot of the calendar invite as it appears on my calendar. If you prefer we can keep Meet but I'll coordinate with our ops team for a temporary exception.

Next steps: if Zoom is ok, I'll create a new invite and claim host; otherwise, please resend with an organizer who has external sharing enabled.

Cheers,
Ben
Senior Sales Engineer, Redwood Inference
[attachment: invite-screenshot.png (image/png)]

On Sun, Nov 8, 2026 at 2:15 PM Alice Park <alice@finova.com> wrote:
> Hi Ben,
> 
> Thanks for the quick sync earlier. We're excited to see Redwood in action. Gopal and I are available next week...

From: Marissa Cole <marissa@redwood.ai>
To: Ben Carter <ben@redwood.ai>, Sean Gallagher <sean@redwood.ai>
Date: Mon, 09 Nov 2026 08:04:00 -08:00
Subject: Fwd: Redwood demo — organizer token issue / propose Zoom host claim

Ben / Sean — quick read. If Finova is okay, propose we host on Zoom and use an enforced passcode. Ops can claim host rights and enable waiting room so only invited attendees get in. That avoids asking the customer to change org settings. 

I can approve a one-off Zoom host claim for this demo under the customer success playbook; Ben, if you send me the final time I'll add the Zoom invite and the firewall note for security.

Marissa Cole
Director, Commercial Sales Ops

--
Marissa's suggested checklist:
- Create Zoom meeting with passcode + waiting room
- Attach redwood-demo-v2.ics to final invite
- Add short note in invite body: "If your org blocks Meet links, use the Zoom link provided"
- Log host claim in internal notes (HubSpot link below)

From: Ben Carter <ben@redwood.ai>
To: Alice Park <alice@finova.com>
Cc: Gopal Singh <gopal.singh@finova.com>, Marissa Cole <marissa@redwood.ai>, Sean Gallagher <sean@redwood.ai>
Date: Mon, 09 Nov 2026 09:22:00 -08:00
Subject: Re: Redwood demo — organizer token appears invalid, propose Zoom handoff

Alice / Gopal — thanks for flagging. To avoid any SSO friction on your side, Redwood will host on Zoom for this session. I've reserved Tuesday, 11/16 at 10:30am PT and attached a new calendar invite (redwood-demo-v2.ics). The invite includes the Zoom link and a short note: "If your org blocks Meet links, please join via Zoom link below." 

Sean will be host and we will enable waiting room + passcode. Please accept the attached invite. If you'd rather keep Meet, say the word and we'll revert; otherwise we'll assume Zoom is fine and consider this confirmed when you accept.

Best,
Ben
Senior Sales Engineer, Redwood Inference
[attachment: redwood-demo-v2.ics (text/calendar)]

On Mon, Nov 9, 2026 at 8:04 AM Marissa Cole <marissa@redwood.ai> wrote:
> Ben / Sean — quick read. If Finova is okay, propose we host on Zoom and use an enforced passcode...
